title: Calendario acelerado - Elite Mexico
content:
Some projects that have little or no down-time available can take advantage of specialty systems that can be installed on an accelerated time schedule. This is achieved through the use of specialized products and accelerators that decrease curing time.
Situations where typically used
Emergency repairs & restoration
Overrun schedules
Holiday closings
Maintenance shutdowns
Cool weather installs
Contact an Elite Mexico technical representative for more details.
